shorts.title: Joint operation leads to drug, gun seizures, arrest
shorts.title_distilled: Joint operation leads to drug, gun seizures, arrest.
shorts.description: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A multi-week narcotics investigation in Lackawanna County resulted in the seizure of several illegal drugs and guns. The joint operation was between the District Attorney's Office Narcotics unit, the Scranton Police Street Crimes unit, the Pennsylvania State Police Vice Unit, and the US Marshals Fugitive Task Force. The operation revealed more [...]

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — People across Lackawanna County are doing their part to protect the environment, one appliance at a time. Johnson College is hosting a two-day "Refrigerant Recycling Event." The event gives the community a free and easy way to safely dispose of items like refrigerators, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers. Cars lined up [...]

shorts.title: Officials urging safety at gorge ahead of summer months
shorts.title_distilled: Officials urging safety at gorge ahead of summer months.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — First responders are urging caution for visitors to Nay Aug Gorge in Scranton as summer approaches. The scenic spot has a history of trespassing and poses significant dangers to those who venture off designated trails. The Scranton Fire Department responds to three to five rescue calls at Nay Aug Gorge [...]

The Scranton Fire Department responds to three to five rescue calls at Nay Aug Gorge [...]
shorts.content_distilled: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY  — First responders are urging caution for visitors to Nay Aug Gorge in Scranton as summer approaches.
